2026-04-08T20:24:36.2192864Z   script: const { setupGlobals } = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/setup_globals.cjs');

const { main } = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/safe_output_handler_manager.cjs');
await main();
